text: During these testing times Gujarat government should support schools that are finding new ways to bring normalcy in the lives of the school going children.
I want to go back to my campus and dorm yes, only I really want people to wear a mask or if they can’t do that then stay home.

@ZacBissonnette That video, my god. I'm as progressive as the next person and I dearly hope Trump will lose, but I can't remember the last time I watched such a cynical, fear-mongering piece of propaganda. Keeping schools closed will be devastating for our most vulnerable children.
@JoeBiden No we aren’t, many children are being left behind by closed schools
